summary: Iter 43 — Counter-offer feature removal + artist payment-detail hiding. All 12 backend tests PASS (pytest). Frontend ArtistDashboard renders cleanly at /artist with zero JS/console errors, no CounterModal or counter_price references, no 'Counter Offer' button anywhere on the page, Total Earnings KPI is visible (₹6,81,600 for Priya) and correctly computed from pricing.artist_fee. Booking rows show only Accept/Reject actions — no counter option. Sensitive customer-payment terms (Platform Fee, GST Collected, Amount Paid, amount_paid, Refund) are ABSENT from the artist dashboard body text. CustomerDashboard still shows the AMOUNT column with amount_paid values (e.g. ₹1,823) as expected. Full happy-path booking flow (create → artist accept → confirmed) verified via API and status persists on GET.
critical_code_review_comments: RoleDashboards.jsx L205-206 (Agency dashboard) still reads `pricing.platform_fee` and `pricing.gst` to render a 'Quarterly GST' widget. Per the business rule in the review ('Platform ONLY collects 5% + 18% GST — NEVER show these to artists'), the same principle arguably applies to agencies (agency is not the collector — BookTalent is). Consider hiding this widget from agency dashboard or gating it behind an admin/finance role, since the platform fee is BookTalent's revenue, not the agency's. Not blocking iter43 which is scoped to artist-side.

backend/server.py — still 2,958 lines, refactor debt flagged since iter36+. Booking-related handlers (models 348-390, endpoints 1285-1580, invoice/contract 2500-2540) could live in a `routes/bookings.py` module.

ArtistDashboard.jsx L123, L315, L508, L519 — same fallback expression `b.pricing?.artist_fee || (b.pricing?.package_fee||0)+(b.pricing?.addons_total||0) || 0` is copy-pasted 4 times. Extract to a helper `artistFee(b)` to keep this consistent (esp. important because the review request calls out this exact expression as the correctness contract).

Route naming inconsistency: the review request said 'visit /dashboard' but the actual React route is `/artist` (App.js L72). Post-login redirect goes to `/artist` for artist role — consider adding an alias route `/dashboard` that resolves to the correct role dashboard, or fix the review-request copy.

Cleanup: the removed 'counter-offer' code path left orphan Marker comments — server.py L372-373 (BookingStatusUpdate) and L2525 ('Counter-offer endpoint removed…'). Leaving the comments is OK but the frontend has no matching cleanup note in ArtistDashboard.jsx (only a git-history artifact). Non-blocking.

backend/tests/test_iter4.py — TestCounterFlow is marked skip. Since the feature is fully removed, consider deleting the class entirely (dead code) rather than leaving a permanently-skipped test that will confuse future maintainers.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — ArtistDashboard clean of all counter-offer + customer-payment leakage; CustomerDashboard payment info intact

seed_data_creation: Test class creates ~12 disposable TEST bookings for Priya (uses randomised 2027-2029 event_dates + mandatory PW_Sound_Setup addon). Post-run these appear as 'Pending payment' or 'Rejected' in the artist booking list — cleanup would require a DELETE endpoint or an admin scrub.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Counter-offer feature is fully removed on both sides. Backend Literal on BookingStatusUpdate.action is exactly [accept, reject, start, complete, approve_completion, cancel] and the /bookings/{bid}/counter endpoint returns 404. Frontend ArtistDashboard route is `/artist` (NOT /dashboard). Priya's user_id: 22c3967c-e432-41e8-bdfb-a0a54b82ee1b. Priya has a mandatory addon 'PW_Sound_Setup' — any test that creates a booking against Priya MUST include her mandatory addon selection or the POST /bookings will 400. See _get_mandatory_addon_selections() helper in test_iter43_counter_removed.py for the correct pattern (also documented in test_iter36_special_instructions.py).
rca of the issue: Not applicable — this iteration is a regression verification, not a bug fix. All 8 review-request items verified green: (1) action='counter' → 422 with Literal validation error citing 'counter'; (2) POST /bookings/{bid}/counter → 405 Method Not Allowed (no such route in FastAPI); (3) BookingStatusUpdate only defines `action` and `reason`, no counter_price; (4) full booking→accept→confirmed happy path works and status persists on GET; (5) ArtistDashboard mounts at /artist with zero page errors and no undefined-CounterModal reference; (6) NO Counter Offer button in DOM, only smart-accept-*/smart-reject-* buttons; no Platform Fee/GST/Amount Paid/Refund text on artist side; Total Earnings KPI renders ₹6,81,600 computed from pricing.artist_fee; (7) CustomerDashboard shows AMOUNT column with amount_paid (e.g. ₹1,823 for platform fee + GST); (8) zero console errors, zero page errors during ArtistDashboard mount + Overview + Bookings tab interaction.
